JavaScript is required on this site. Toggle navigation Xanthomonas arboricola (XANTRB) Menu Overview → Overview Code created in: 2022-11-08 Basic information EPPO Code: XANTRB Preferred name: Xanthomonas arboricola Authority: Vauterin et al. Propose photo Taxonomy Kingdom Bacteria      (
      1BACTK      ) Phylum Proteobacteria      (
      1PROBP      ) Class Gammaproteobacteria      (
      1GAMBC      ) Order Lysobacterales      (
      1LYSOO      ) Family Lysobacteraceae      (
      1LYSOF      ) Genus Xanthomonas      (
      1XANTG      ) Species Xanthomonas arboricola      (
      XANTRB      )

seed.symptoms: Water-soaked spots on leaves becoming angular necrotic lesions; fruit with sunken, dark, cracked lesions; shot-hole appearance on leaves.
seed.causes: Bacterium Xanthomonas arboricola pv. pruni; spreads through rain splash and wind during wet weather.
seed.treatment: Copper-based bactericides applied preventively; oxytetracycline where permitted.
seed.prevention: Plant resistant varieties; avoid overhead irrigation; prune for airflow; windbreaks to reduce spread.
